sales.orders.comment: Canonical transactional order header; ARR and revenue recognition depend on row-level status and amounts.

sales.customers.comment: Customer master for B2B accounts; feeds CRM campaigns and credit checks.

sales.order_lines.comment: Line-level revenue and product mix; joins orders to products and promotions.

sales.products.comment: Product catalog SKU reference; pricing and inventory feeds.

finance.invoices.comment: Posted AR invoices; downstream to GL subledger and collections.

finance.payments.comment: Cash application against invoices; treasury reconciliation.

finance.credits.comment: Credit memos and adjustments; impacts margin reporting.

finance.commissions.comment: Sales rep compensation accruals by period.

finance.budget_lines.comment: Departmental budget vs actual driver table.

finance.tax_rates.comment: Jurisdiction tax reference for invoicing and compliance.

finance.contracts.comment: Commercial contract headers for billing schedules.

logistics.shipments.comment: Fulfillment and carrier tracking; WMS integration.

logistics.warehouses.comment: Physical site master for stock and routing rules.

logistics.inventory_snapshots.comment: Point-in-time stock levels for planning and OTIF reports.

crm.accounts.comment: Enterprise account hierarchy for territory and pipeline coverage.

crm.leads.comment: Inbound lead funnel prior to opportunity conversion.

marketing.campaign_results.comment: Spend and response metrics by channel.

analytics.forecast_runs.comment: Scenario planning outputs for revenue forecasting.

analytics.targets.comment: Quarterly targets by team and product line.

analytics.return_authorizations.comment: RMA workflow tied to orders and refunds.

legacy_hebrew.חשבוניות.comment: Legacy Hebrew billing system; invoices mirrored into finance.invoices.

temp_junk.Tmp_7.comment: Scratch staging table used by ETL probes; drop after cutover.
